title: Vacancy for Teacher at Amity University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Amity University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
